response.overview: after a particularly difficult year and admitting myself to a psychiatric facility,  i collected Super8 footage, diary entries, hospital reports, coloring book pages, and other artifacts. it was important to me to keep record of this hazy, warped period of time. in therapy, i practiced EMDR tapping techniques to process distressing memories. intake report combines a cold, blunt, medical perspective of events with the deeply personal, revealing a new version of the truth.
response.tagline: but today i heard the birds outside
response.title: intake report
